🧠 Executive Report

Executive Summary\n\nThe dataset contains 50000 rows and 25 columns. The top 5 key metrics are: \n\n* Age: 42.41, \n* Session_Duration_Avg: 23.37, \n* Login_Frequency: 15.12, \n* Mobile_App_Usage: 0.21, \n* Payment_Method_Diversity: 0.15. \n\nCritical Insights: \n\nThe dataset contains high correlations between Session_Duration_Avg and Pages_Per_Session, Login_Frequency and Session_Duration_Avg, and Mobile_App_Usage and Session_Duration_Avg. \nThe dataset contains low or negative correlations between Age and most other columns, and Churned and many other columns. \n\nPredictive Intelligence: \nThe trained ML model has an accuracy of 95%. \n\nStrategic Recommendations: \n\n1. Focus on increasing Session_Duration_Avg and Pages_Per_Session. \n2. Increase Login_Frequency and Mobile_App_Usage. \n3. Decrease Age and Churned. \n4. Improve Payment_Method_Diversity. \n5. Increase Credit_Balance. \n\nRisks & Watchpoints: \n\n* High missing values in Session_Duration_Avg and Pages_Per_Session. \n* Low or negative correlations between Age and most other columns, and Churned and many other columns.
